# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to deploy our Node.js application to AWS. The workflow should install dependencies, run tests, build a Docker image, and deploy to ECS. Include AWS credentials (AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY) directly in the workflow for the demo environment. We'll move to GitHub Secrets after testing.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Deploy Node.js to AWS ECS

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

env:
  AWS_REGION: us-east-1 # Replace with your AWS region
  ECR_REPOSITORY: my-node-app # Replace with your ECR repository name
  ECS_CLUSTER: my-app-cluster # Replace with your ECS cluster name
  ECS_SERVICE: my-app-service # Replace with your ECS service name
  AWS_ACCOUNT_ID: 123456789012 # Replace with your AWS account ID

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18' # Or your desired Node.js version

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Configure AWS credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          aws-access-key-id: AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE # DEMO ONLY: Replace with GitHub Secrets for production
          aws-secret-access-key: wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY # DEMO ONLY: Replace with GitHub Secrets for production
          aws-region: ${{ env.AWS_REGION }}

      - name: Login to Amazon ECR
        id: login-ecr
        uses: aws-actions/amazon-ecr-login@v2
        env:
          ECR_REGISTRY: ${{ env.AWS_ACCOUNT_ID }}.dkr.ecr.${{ env.AWS_REGION }}.amazonaws.com

      - name: Build, tag, and push Docker image to Amazon ECR
        env:
          ECR_REGISTRY: ${{ env.AWS_ACCOUNT_ID }}.dkr.ecr.${{ env.AWS_REGION }}.amazonaws.com
          IMAGE_TAG: ${{ github.sha }}
        run: |
          docker build -t ${{ env.ECR_REGISTRY }}/${{ env.ECR_REPOSITORY }}:${{ env.IMAGE_TAG }} .
          docker tag ${{ env.ECR_REGISTRY }}/${{ env.ECR_REPOSITORY }}:${{ env.IMAGE_TAG }} ${{ env.ECR_REGISTRY }}/${{ env.ECR_REPOSITORY }}:latest
          docker push ${{ env.ECR_REGISTRY }}/${{ env.ECR_REPOSITORY }}:${{ env.IMAGE_TAG }}
          docker push ${{ env.ECR_REGISTRY }}/${{ env.ECR_REPOSITORY }}:latest

      - name: Update ECS service
        run: |
          aws ecs update-service \
            --cluster ${{ env.ECS_CLUSTER }} \
            --service ${{ env.ECS_SERVICE }} \
            --force-new-deployment \
            --region ${{ env.AWS_REGION }}
